chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No. 2425 of 2014 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution (Notice of C.M.A. No. 951/2021 and C.M.A. 952/2021 not issued as cost and copies not supplied) ------------------ 08.03.2021 Mr. Khalid Iqbal Advocate holding brief for Mr. Rehman Ghous, Advocate for plaintiff alongwith plaintiff. Muhammad Ovais Qureshi representative of defendant No. 1 (Qureshi Cooperative Housing Society, Karachi). ------------------ By means of this application, the plaintiff seeks withdrawal of the instant suit unconditionally. The application has been filed through Attorney; however, the plaintiff has also made his signature on it. Plaintiff Muhammad Faraz, holding CNIC No. 42301-1078195-1A, is present and states that he has settled the dispute with the defendants outside the Court; therefore, this application has been filed. There is no impediment in allowing this application; hence, the same is allowed and in result thereof, the suit stands dismissed as withdrawn, alongwith pending applications. JUDGE Athar Zai
